CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-30-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brian Johnson, of the Chanler Group, Tel. 510.848.8880, for plaintiffs;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF WHITNEY LEEMAN's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
